mapper.select: /* LoginMapper.selectLoginFailCnt */ SELECT FAIL_CNT FROM TB_USER_INFO WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{memberId}
/* LoginMapper.selectConfmYn */ SELECT CONFM_YN FROM TB_USER_INFO WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{memberId}

/* LoginMapper.actionLogin */ SELECT A.MEMBER_ID AS memberId ,A.AUTH_GRP_CD AS authGrpCd ,A.MEMBER_NM AS memberNm ,A.MASTER_CODE AS masterCode ,A.MEMBER_EMAIL AS memberEmail ,A.MEMBER_BRTHDY AS memberBrthdy ,A.MEMBER_PHONE AS memberPhone ,A.MEMBER_POST AS memberPost ,A.MEMBER_ADDR AS memberAddr ,A.MEMBER_ADDR_DETL AS memberAddrDetl ,DATE_FORMAT(A.LAST_LOGIN_DT, '%Y%m%d') AS lastLoginDt ,A.FAIL_CNT AS failCnt FROM TB_USER_INFO A WHERE A.MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} AND A.MEMBER_PW = #{memberPw} AND A.USE_YN = 'Y'
/* LoginMapper.checkId */ SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_USER_INFO WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{memberId}
